text: Did you know your brain can strengthen connections just by repeating actions? This process is called Long-Term Potentiation, or LTP. When you repeatedly activate a synapse, it becomes more sensitive, enhancing the signal. Research shows LTP can last for hours, sometimes even longer. Think about it: every time you practice, you're literally rewiring your brain. Want to learn more about your brain? Hit follow for more neuroscience insights!
